mapper.select: SELECT id, name, category, area, emission, height, year, quarter, create_time, ST_X(geom) AS lon, ST_Y(geom) AS lat, ST_AsText(geom) AS geom FROM carbonpoint

SELECT id, name, category, area, emission, height, year, quarter, create_time, ST_X(geom) AS lon, ST_Y(geom) AS lat, ST_AsText(geom) AS geom FROM carbonpoint WHERE year = #{year} AND quarter = #{quarter}

SELECT MIN(id) AS id, name, category, area, SUM(emission) AS emission, height, year, 'ALL' AS quarter, MIN(create_time) AS create_time, ST_X(geom) AS lon, ST_Y(geom) AS lat, ST_AsText(geom) AS geom FROM carbonpoint WHERE year = #{year} GROUP BY name, category, area, height, year, geom

SELECT id, name, category, emission, year, quarter, create_time, ST_X(geom) AS lon, ST_Y(geom) AS lat, ST_AsText(geom) AS geom FROM carbon_custom_point WHERE year = #{year} AND user_id=#{userId} AND quarter = #{quarter}

SELECT MIN(id) AS id, name, category, SUM(emission) AS emission, year, 'ALL' AS quarter, MIN(create_time) AS create_time, ST_X(geom) AS lon, ST_Y(geom) AS lat, ST_AsText(geom) AS geom FROM carbon_custom_point WHERE year = #{year} AND user_id=#{userId} GROUP BY name, category, year, geom

SELECT id, name, category, area, emission, height, year, quarter, create_time, ST_X(geom) AS lon, ST_Y(geom) AS lat, ST_AsText(geom) AS geom FROM carbonpoint WHERE 1=1
AND 1=0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
